results.stepsShort: Run predictRoutingRiskCosts on 1 segment, repeat 5 runs
results.expectedResult: Risk output (routing_cost, risk_level) returns within 1.0 s per call
results.actualResult: Median: 0.462 ms across 5 runs; cold-start first run: 841.693 ms; risk_level returned
results.notes: Measured with performance.now() in TSX harness under apps/server; executed 5 single-segment runs; source: raw benchmark JSON trace and harness log.

results.stepsShort: Run 1,000-segment prediction batch, repeat 5 runs
results.expectedResult: recommended_speed_kph generated for all segments with average latency < 10 ms
results.actualResult: Average: 3.562 ms across 5 runs; speed tiers observed: 15, 25, 35, 45
results.notes: Measured with performance.now() in the same server TSX benchmark on 1,000 segments; 5 repeated runs; speed tiers read from prediction output set.

results.stepsShort: Compare prediction runtime with LOG_ROUTING_RISK=0 vs LOG_ROUTING_RISK=1
results.expectedResult: CSV rows append with required fields and logging overhead stays below 3x baseline
results.actualResult: Off avg: 2.189 ms; On avg: 5.997 ms; Overhead: 173.95%; CSV header verified; 5,000 rows appended
results.notes: Measured by toggling LOG_ROUTING_RISK in the TSX benchmark (5 runs each mode); durations from performance.now(); CSV evidence read from generated artifact file.

results.testCase: Flood Risk + Speed Guidance Cold-Start Trace
results.stepsShort: Run one 2-segment prediction request
results.expectedResult: First-call inference returns risk + guidance within 1.0 s
results.actualResult: Completed in 403.433 ms; outputs included LOW/45, HIGH/15
results.notes: Measured in a fresh TSX harness process calling predictRoutingRiskCosts once with two segments; elapsed time from performance.now(); single cold-start run.

results.stepsShort: Execute 20 concurrent prediction calls (100 segments each)
results.expectedResult: All concurrent requests complete with no failed responses
results.actualResult: 20 concurrent requests completed; total: 6.692 ms; average: 0.335 ms per request; failures: 0
results.notes: Measured with Promise.all in server TSX benchmark; each request contained 100 segments; one 20-request concurrency run; timing source: performance.now().

results.stepsShort: Run blockchain test suite and capture verify scenario timing
results.expectedResult: Local-chain verification flow completes within 2.0 s
results.actualResult: Verifier can verifyTask completed in 731 ms
results.notes: Measured from Hardhat test output in apps/blockchain (`pnpm --dir apps/blockchain test`); verify scenario timing captured from reporter output; 1 suite run.

results.stepsShort: Run admin correction flow in security suite
results.expectedResult: Revoke + reverify flow completes within 500 ms
results.actualResult: Admin can revoke then reverify completed in 49 ms
results.notes: Measured from the same Hardhat suite output; revoke/reverify case timing parsed from test reporter line; single observed run.

results.stepsShort: Run gas snapshot test
results.expectedResult: estimateGas remains within configured budget (<= 80,000)
results.actualResult: Gas estimate: 49,275 (budget: 80,000)
results.notes: Taken from Hardhat gas snapshot output (`pnpm --dir apps/blockchain test:gas`); source line `[gas] verifyTask estimateGas=... budget=...`; 1 run.

results.stepsShort: Run dispatch-chain tests in server
results.expectedResult: Hashing subtests pass and each hash operation remains < 15 ms
results.actualResult: Canonical hash: 7.5556 ms; proof-file hash: 0.2605 ms; deterministic-order hash prep: 2.2057 ms (3/3 pass)
results.notes: Measured from TAP duration_ms in apps/server dispatch-chain test (`pnpm --dir apps/server run test:dispatch-chain`); one full run.

results.stepsShort: Run full blockchain suite and capture runtime gasUsed log
results.expectedResult: gasUsed remains below 80,000 and close to estimate
results.actualResult: Gas used: 49,287; delta vs estimate: 12 (0.02%)
results.notes: Gas used captured from full Hardhat suite output; compared against estimateGas from gas snapshot test; sources: blockchain test logs; one run each command.

results.testCase: Flood Risk Endpoint Empty Input Rejection
results.stepsShort: Validate routingRiskPredictSchema with segments: []
results.expectedResult: Request is rejected for empty segments (minimum 1)
results.actualResult: Rejected with too_small: "Too small: expected array to have >=1 items"
results.notes: Validated routingRiskPredictSchema in a server TSX harness using safeParse; source is direct schema issue output; single execution.

issues.message: Too small: expected array to have >=1 items
Too big: expected array to have <=1000 items
Invalid input: expected number, received string
Unrecognized key: "admin"
Unrecognized key: "debug"

results.stepsShort: Validate schema with 1,001 segments
results.expectedResult: Request is rejected for exceeding max segment count (1000)
results.actualResult: Rejected with too_big: "Too big: expected array to have <=1000 items"
results.notes: Validated 1,001-segment payload with routingRiskPredictSchema.safeParse in TSX harness; measured through returned Zod issue list; 1 run.

issues.message: Too small: expected array to have >=1 items
Too big: expected array to have <=1000 items
Invalid input: expected number, received string
Unrecognized key: "admin"
Unrecognized key: "debug"

results.stepsShort: Submit string payload in numeric field (flood_depth_5yr)
results.expectedResult: Non-numeric/script-like input is rejected
results.actualResult: Rejected with invalid_type: "Invalid input: expected number, received string" at segments.0.flood_depth_5yr
results.notes: Tested script-like string in numeric field via routingRiskPredictSchema.safeParse in TSX harness; evidence from issue path and code; 1 run.

issues.message: Too small: expected array to have >=1 items
Too big: expected array to have <=1000 items
Invalid input: expected number, received string
Unrecognized key: "admin"
Unrecognized key: "debug"

results.stepsShort: Submit extra keys (admin, debug) to strict schemas
results.expectedResult: Unexpected keys are blocked
results.actualResult: Rejected with unrecognized_keys for admin/debug fields
results.notes: Submitted unexpected keys to strict routing-risk schemas in TSX harness; evaluated Zod unrecognized_keys output; single run.

issues.message: Too small: expected array to have >=1 items
Too big: expected array to have <=1000 items
Invalid input: expected number, received string
Unrecognized key: "admin"
Unrecognized key: "debug"

results.testCase: Structured CSV Log Sensitive-Field Exposure Check
results.stepsShort: Inspect generated routing-risk CSV header and first data row
results.expectedResult: Logs exclude secrets (no token/JWT/password/private key fields)
results.actualResult: Header contained routing/model/weather fields only; sensitive columns detected: none
results.notes: Generated a fresh routing-risk CSV via TSX harness, then inspected header and first row using regex checks for token/JWT/password/secret fields; 1 run.

results.stepsShort: Call protected route without Authorization header
results.expectedResult: Middleware returns 401 Unauthorized
results.actualResult: 401 with body {"message":"Unauthorized"}
results.notes: Executed local Express harness importing requireAuth; called protected route without Authorization header via fetch; captured HTTP status/body; 1 run.

results.stepsShort: Call protected route with malformed bearer token
results.expectedResult: Middleware returns 401 Invalid token
results.actualResult: 401 with body {"message":"Invalid token"}
results.notes: Executed same Express harness with malformed bearer token against requireAuth route; measured response status/body from fetch; 1 run.

results.stepsShort: Hit role-guarded route as no-role and VOLUNTEER (control: LGU)
results.expectedResult: No-role gets 401, disallowed role gets 403, allowed role gets 200
results.actualResult: No-role: 401; Volunteer: 403; LGU control: 200
results.notes: Measured with local Express middleware harness importing requireRole('LGU','ADMIN'); sent three role scenarios via fetch; one run per role.

results.stepsShort: Send 35 rapid POSTs through routingOptimizeLimiter
results.expectedResult: First 30 pass, excess requests are rate-limited with 429
results.actualResult: 30 requests returned 200; 5 requests returned 429; first 429 at request #31; avg 2.585 ms/request
results.notes: Measured via local Express harness with routingOptimizeLimiter middleware; fired 35 sequential POST requests and counted status codes using fetch; timing from performance.now().

results.stepsShort: Run security suite case for non-verifier calling verifyTask
results.expectedResult: Unauthorized account is blocked by access control
results.actualResult: Test passed: "Stranger cannot verifyTask (missing VERIFIER_ROLE)"
results.notes: Verified from Hardhat security suite output and assertion coverage in apps/blockchain/test/SecurityCases.test.ts; command: pnpm --dir apps/blockchain test; 1 suite run.

results.stepsShort: Run non-admin revoke/reverify and grant-verifier attempts
results.expectedResult: Unauthorized admin-level actions are blocked
results.actualResult: Revoke/Reverify blocked (38 ms); GrantVerifier blocked
results.notes: Measured from the HK unauthorized-admin cases in SecurityCases.test.ts output; source command: pnpm --dir apps/blockchain test; 1 suite run.

results.stepsShort: Attempt second verifyTask on same task hash
results.expectedResult: Replay is rejected with ALREADY_VERIFIED
results.actualResult: Test passed: duplicate verification blocked (ALREADY_VERIFIED)
results.notes: Verified replay-protection assertion from SecurityCases.test.ts and Hardhat test output for ALREADY_VERIFIED condition; one suite run.

results.stepsShort: Attempt revoke/reverify for task never verified
results.expectedResult: Contract rejects tamper path with NOT_VERIFIED
results.actualResult: Test passed: "Cannot revoke/reverify a task that was never verified (NOT_VERIFIED)"
results.notes: Verified tamper-path rejection by matching NOT_VERIFIED test assertion and runtime output in blockchain security suite; 1 suite run.
